response.justification: The candidate has 17+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and systems domains, and has recently begun contributing to AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq (April 2025 onward). However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, demonstrated AI/ML expertise, a track record of building AI products or platforms at scale, and the credibility to advise enterprise customers on AI strategy. None of that is evidenced here. AI work is less than 14 months old and scoped to developer tooling rather than strategic product development. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage and Kubernetes deployment — not cloud architecture or platform strategy. There is no advanced AI/ML degree, no published research, no enterprise advisory history, and no indication of thought leadership at the scale this role requires.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous, diverse software engineering experience across many platforms and stacks
Recent direct involvement with AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing active engagement with the AI tooling space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source founder experience (GISCollective) and a history of community knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: AI/ML expertise is nascent — the entire AI exposure begins in April 2025 with no prior products, platforms, or published work in AI or machine learning
No evidence of Director-level IC responsibilities, enterprise customer advisory, or strategic influence at the scale this role requires
Cloud footprint is shallow — using AWS CDK for a pricing service and deploying to Kubernetes does not constitute cloud architecture or platform strategy experience
